samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement 8-bit multiplication using shift and add.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="BIT_WIDTH" value="8" type="size_t">Bit width for inputs A and B.</parameter>
        <parameter name="OUTPUT_WIDTH" value="16" type="size_t">Output width for the product.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0]" id="product">Product accumulator.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[BIT_WIDTH-1:0]" id="shift_cnt">Counter for shift operations.</reg>
        <wire id="shift_A">Shifted version of input A.</wire>
        <wire id="add">Control signal for addition.</wire>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <assignment>product = 0;</assignment>
        <assignment>shift_cnt = 0;</assignment>
        <always_comb>
            <for>
                <init><assignment>add = 0;</assignment></init>
                <cond><expression>shift_cnt < BIT_WIDTH</expression></cond>
                <inc><assignment>shift_cnt = shift_cnt + 1;</assignment></inc>
                <statement>
                    <if>
                        <cond><expression>B[shift_cnt]</expression></cond>
                        <then><assignment>product = product + shift_A;</assignment></then>
                    </if>
                </statement>
            </for>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb>
            <assignment>shift_A = A << shift_cnt;</assignment>
        </always_comb>
    </implementation>
</module>
